purpose_context: Mission 01KVGCE8 unified the surface-selection resolver, but the operator read CLIs still bypass it for bare-slug handles against coord-topology missions, leaving the read/write desync (#2007) open on the read path. This mission adopts the canonical resolver across all read commands behind one guarded seam and adds a selection-authority guard so the bypass class cannot recur.
purpose_tldr: Route every operator read command through the one canonical surface resolver so a bare-slug handle never silently reads a stale split-brain surface.
